+    @torch.no_grad()

+    def beam_search(self, images, sos_id, eos_id, beam_width=5, max_len=256):

+        self.eval()

+        B = images.size(0)

+        device = images.device

+        memory = self.encoder(images)

+        memory_exp = memory.repeat_interleave(beam_width, dim=0)

+

+        sequences = torch.full((B * beam_width, 1), sos_id, dtype=torch.long, device=device)

+        scores = torch.zeros(B, beam_width, device=device)

+        scores[:, 1:] = float('-inf')

+        finished = torch.zeros(B, beam_width, dtype=torch.bool, device=device)

+

+        for step in range(max_len - 1):

+            tgt_len = sequences.size(1)

+            mask = HMERModel.generate_square_subsequent_mask(tgt_len).to(device)

+            out = self.decoder(sequences, memory_exp, tgt_mask=mask)

+            log_probs = torch.log_softmax(out[:, -1, :], dim=-1)

+            log_probs = log_probs.view(B, beam_width, -1)

+

+            if finished.any():

+                log_probs = log_probs.masked_fill(finished.unsqueeze(-1), float('-inf'))

+                eos_zeros = torch.zeros_like(log_probs[:, :, eos_id])

+                log_probs[:, :, eos_id] = torch.where(finished, eos_zeros, log_probs[:, :, eos_id])

+

+            new_scores = scores.unsqueeze(-1) + log_probs

+            new_scores_flat = new_scores.view(B, -1)

+

+            top_scores, top_indices = torch.topk(new_scores_flat, beam_width, dim=-1)

+            beam_indices = top_indices // log_probs.size(-1)

+            token_indices = top_indices % log_probs.size(-1)

+

+            batch_indices = torch.arange(B, device=device).unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, beam_width)

+            flat_beam_indices = batch_indices * beam_width + beam_indices

+

+            sequences = sequences[flat_beam_indices.view(-1)]

+            new_tokens = token_indices.view(B * beam_width, 1)

+            sequences = torch.cat([sequences, new_tokens], dim=1)

+

+            scores = top_scores

+            finished = finished[batch_indices, beam_indices] | (token_indices == eos_id)

+

+            if finished.all():

+                break

+

+        return sequences[::beam_width]

+

     @staticmethod

     def generate_square_subsequent_mask(sz):

         mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(sz, sz), diagonal=1)
